name: Graviton
description: Auto-scroll survival: kontroliši gravitaciju jednim pritiskom i izbegavaj prepreke beskonačno dugo.

modules.src/main.js: Entry point — inicijalizuje canvas, pokreće requestAnimationFrame loop, wire-uje update/render, periodično save-uje state
modules.src/config.js: Sve tuning konstante iz GDD-a: GRAVITY, VELOCITY_MAX, SCROLL_BASE/MAX, G_OVERLOAD, canvas dimenzije, boje, hitbox radijusi
modules.src/state.js: Game state shape (gamePhase enum, brod, zones, g_overload_timer, survival_time, speed_level, zone_index), createState/resetState/loadBest/saveBest
modules.src/input.js: Keyboard (Space, ArrowUp, ArrowDown) + mouse click + touch tap handlers; emituje flipPressed boolean per frame, konzumira se jednom
modules.src/render.js: Canvas rendering: pozadina sa zvezdom/nebulom, pod/plafon sa neon ivicom, brod (pixel-art trokut sa G-overload bojom), prepreke (blokovi/šiljci/buzzsaw), HUD overlay
modules.src/audio.js: Web Audio API: flip whoosh (oscillator sweep), G-overload beep (ubrzavajući interval), death chord (minor cluster fadeout 300ms), milestone arpeggio (chiptune)
modules.src/ui.js: Start screen (IDLE), end screen (HIGH_SCORE_CHECK) sa CRASHED AT / BEST TIME / zvezda oznakama, RESTART dugme — sve crtano na canvas-u
modules.src/entities/player.js: Brod: pozicija, velocity_y, gravity_direction, G-overload timer/ratio, flip logika sa cooldown-om, boja interpolacija, vizuelna rotacija animacija
modules.src/systems/physics.js: Scroll update (pomera zone levo), gravity update (velocity_y += gravity * dt, clamp, brod.y += velocity_y * dt), delta time utils
modules.src/systems/collision.js: AABB circle-rect za blokove i šiljke, circle-circle za buzzsaw, pod/plafon line check — vraca death trigger boolean
modules.src/systems/generator.js: Proceduralni generator zona: 100 zona na startu (3 tutorial + 97 gameplay), šabloni T0–T9, parametarska varijacija, difficulty scaling, CALM_OPEN injekcija
modules.styles/base.css: Responsive full-screen canvas layout, body background, touch-action none, font-family
modules.styles/ui.css: HUD pozicioniranje (survival time gore-levo, speed level gore-desno), start/end screen overlay stilovi, dugme stilovi
modules.styles/game.css: Brod flip rotacija (@keyframes 150ms), G-overload color transition, speed level HUD flash animacija
